allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Recurse C:\\Git\\noorish\\frontend\\src | Where-Object { !$_.PSIsContainer } | Select-Object FullName, Length)
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f'{i[\\"id\\"]} | {i[\\"name\\"]}'\) for i in data]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); items=data if isinstance\(data,list\) else data.get\('items',data.get\('results',[]\)\); [print\(f'{i[\\"id\\"]} | {i[\\"name\\"]}'\) for i in items]")
